strengthening_paths.suggestion: For Conjecture 3, add an explicit global condition that no feasible retained mass above m^c can exceed U(m^c), or state the conjecture as a local two-cell construction with that verified in the witness class.

Add one sentence distinguishing population sensitivity parameter rho_bar from a statistical confidence upper bound on the density-ratio share tau, so the proposal is not read as contradicting GRR's point-identification of tau under exact one-sided density assumptions.

Include a small K=2 finite-support numerical witness in the proof route showing m^c>m^0 and a strict endpoint drop; this would make the field-level separation claim auditable before full sharpness is proved.

recommended_next_step: Proceed to Stage 0/1 with Conjecture 1 and Conjecture 3 as the novelty-bearing kernels, keeping Theorems 1 and 2 as sanity faces.
